title: centaurea lacerata
intro: Centaurea lacerata, also known as prickly chrysanthemum or rough knapweed, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, reducing pain, and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Centaurea lacerata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Centaurea lacerata include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
